_description: REAL chain reactions — bottlenecks that propagate through value chains. Each chain has trigger, mechanism, propagation sequence, tier multipliers. Edward updatable.
_philosophy: Document REAL observed chain patterns (not theoretical). Mechanism must be CONCRETE (mass-balance, supply-demand math). Projections grounded in historical base rates.

tier_1_primary.description: Direct beneficiary of bottleneck (e.g., NVDA for AI compute)

tier_2_enabler.description: Enables the bottleneck product (e.g., HBM for AI compute)

tier_3_lateral.description: Supplies enablers (e.g., AXTI InP for HBM)

tier_5_speculative.description: Adjacent picks no one talks about yet

chains.name: AI Compute Cascade
chains.trigger_event: AI training compute doubling every 6 months (Epoch AI). 100x scaling required for AGI by 2027 (Leopold).
chains.mechanism: Each frontier model needs 10K-100K H100/H200/B100 GPU clusters. Single cluster $40K-60K capex per GPU. NVDA monopoly creates pricing power that cascades upstream as supply constraints bind at each layer.

propagation_sequence.rationale: Already moved 10x+ since 2023. Still has pricing power 2024-2026. Gross margin 75%+.
Hyperscalers desperate for non-NVDA exposure. Custom chips ramping.
HBM3e priced 4-5x DDR5. Sold out through 2026. CoWoS packaging constraint.
Cluster-to-cluster fiber. NVDA $2B capacity lock-in at LITE.
EUV monopoly (ASML), hybrid bonding (BESI), HBM packaging tools.
InP substrate for lasers (AXTI), pure silica fiber (GLW), advanced ceramics. TINY market caps vs explosive demand.

propagation_sequence.role: Co-Packaged Optics / CW lasers / TFLN modulators
propagation_sequence.rationale: Speculative early-stage. Binary outcomes. Position <0.5% each. CPO adoption inflection 2026-2028.

chains.name: AI Power & Grid Cascade
chains.trigger_event: Single 100K-GPU cluster draws 150 MW (city of 100K people). US grid interconnect queue 4-6 years. Hyperscalers contracting behind-the-meter solutions.
chains.mechanism: AI compute density × cluster size = power demand exceeds normal datacenter by 10x. Behind-the-meter solutions (gas turbines, SMRs, nuclear) bypass grid queue. Utilities with existing capacity get rerated multi-year.

propagation_sequence.rationale: PPAs signed at 2-3x spot. Multi-year contracts already booked.
Transformer lead times 2-3 years. Switchgear backlog historic.
US gas exports + behind-the-meter datacenter deals.
Nuclear renaissance + Russia ban. Spot uranium 2x since 2022.
LEU only US enricher. BWXT only SMR producer with active orders. Multi-year backlog.

chains.name: AI Cooling & Water Cascade
chains.trigger_event: GPU rack power density 4x by 2026 (H100 30-50kW → B200 80-130kW). Air cooling impossible >50kW/rack. Liquid cooling mandatory.
chains.mechanism: Compute density forces liquid cooling adoption. Direct-to-chip + immersion. Water consumption surges in semi-arid datacenter locations.

propagation_sequence.rationale: Pure-play with hyperscaler design wins.
Diversified players gaining datacenter exposure.
Heat dissipation infrastructure.

chains.name: Iran/Middle East War Cascade
chains.trigger_event: Iran-Israel conflict escalation, Strait of Hormuz risk, oil supply disruption fears.
chains.mechanism: Geopolitical risk premium → oil spike → tanker rates rerate (longer routes, fewer ships) → refining margins expand → insurance markets price in war risk → defense spending accelerates.

propagation_sequence.rationale: Direct geopolitical risk premium.

propagation_sequence.role: Tanker companies (longer routes = higher day rates)
propagation_sequence.rationale: Suez avoidance forces longer routes, fewer ships available, rates spike.
Crack spreads widen on supply uncertainty + product demand.
Defense spending accelerates. Ammunition restocking.

propagation_sequence.role: Indonesia oil & gas (ENRG benefits from sustained price)
propagation_sequence.rationale: Bakrie ENRG: 13 oil & gas blocks, $1.4B capex target through 2030.

chains.name: Russia/Ukraine War Cascade
chains.trigger_event: Russian gas weaponization, Ukraine grain corridor disruption, fertilizer supply chain shock.
chains.mechanism: Gas/oil disruption → LNG export premium → fertilizer cost crisis → food security panic → Eastern Europe defense rearmament.

chains.name: NAND Memory Cycle + AI Storage (SNDK Case Study)
chains.trigger_event: 2022-2024 NAND oversupply crash (-70% prices) → major suppliers cut capex 30-50%, idle fabs. AI inference workloads scale 2025+ requiring petabytes of storage per cluster.
chains.mechanism: Supply destruction during cyclical bottom creates undersupply 2025+ AS AI demand layers on TOP of normal cyclical recovery. Pure-play NAND benefits MOST vs diversified memory.
chains.horizon: Q1 2025 - Q4 2027 (cyclical 8 quarters + AI structural overlay)

worked_example_sndk.thesis: How could SNDK go from $30 to $1500+ scenario

components.mechanism: Capex cuts 30-50% during 2022-24 oversupply = fab idling = supply constraint when demand returns. Historical NAND cycles: peak/trough ratios 8-12x.

components.layer: AI inference storage demand bump (NEW non-cyclical layer)
components.mechanism: Each LLM cluster needs PB-scale storage. Enterprise SSD demand +40% YoY for AI. This is INCREMENTAL on top of cyclical recovery — uncorrelated demand source.
SNDK now pure NAND vs diversified MU. Investors pay premium for pure-play exposure. Historical pattern: spinoffs trade at premium 6-18 months post-separation.
Once analyst coverage initiated + sell-side recognizes AI storage thesis = multiple expansion from cyclical low (~5x P/E) to growth multiple (15-25x P/E).

key_invalidations: AI demand normalizes faster than expected (capex pullback)
Capex floods back from competitors (price compression)
Macro Q4 recession kills cyclical recovery

propagation_sequence.rationale: Direct beneficiaries of cyclical + AI overlay.
Less pure exposure but more liquidity.
Equipment cycle follows memory price recovery.

chains.name: GLP-1 Obesity Drug Cascade
chains.trigger_event: GLP-1 efficacy proven (Ozempic, Mounjaro, Zepbound). 100M+ US adults addressable. Supply constrained on peptide synthesis + injection devices.
chains.mechanism: Drug efficacy → demand surge → manufacturing bottleneck → packaging glass/devices premium → behavior change cascades to food/fitness/services.

propagation_sequence.rationale: INVERSE — companies dependent on overconsumption face headwinds.

chains.name: Nuclear Renaissance Cascade
chains.trigger_event: AI power demand + Russia uranium ban (Aug 2024) + climate policy + 50+ new reactors China/India by 2030.
chains.mechanism: Uranium spot rerating → enrichment monopoly (LEU) → SMR vendors → grid integration. Decade structural.

chains.name: Crypto 4-Year Cycle + Halving
chains.trigger_event: BTC halving every 4 years cuts new supply 50%. Combined with stranded power assets pivoting to AI hosting.
chains.mechanism: Halving → miner margin compression → consolidation → strongest survive with pre-connected power infra → AI hosting pivot (revenue $millions/MW vs mining $thousands/MW).

propagation_sequence.role: Miners pivoting to AI hosting (stranded power play)

chains.name: China Semi Decoupling Cascade
chains.trigger_event: US export restrictions on advanced semiconductor equipment to China (ASML EUV, US AI chips ban).
chains.mechanism: Restrictions force China to build domestic semiconductor industry from scratch. Massive government subsidies. Decade-long structural growth for Chinese players + rare earth/critical mineral plays.

add_new_chain: 1. When you spot a new chain reaction (new geopolitical event, new tech inflection, new policy):
2. Add entry to 'chains[]' array following the template above
3. Specify: trigger_event, mechanism, propagation_sequence (with tickers + tier + horizon + multiplier)
4. Commit + push → dashboard auto-load on next refresh
5. Engine will surface tickers in active chains in alpha synthesis
find_more_sndk_examples: Scan logic: ticker is Tier 1 in chain with 'ACTIVE' or 'ACTIVE_INFLECTING' status
AND ticker is in 'INCEPTION' or early 'ACCELERATION' (Soros stage)
